name: extract-seed-manager-and-snapshot
title: Extract SeedManager seam and EngineSnapshot
description: Refactor joal-core to expose a single SeedManager interface (composition root + lifecycle + broadcast events + watch<EngineSnapshot>) so MVP-2 egui can consume one deep handle. Removes SpeedChangedListener orphan trait + SeedingSpeedsHasChanged orphan event. No behaviour change for tracker/byte-compat; main.rs shrinks from ~449 to ~150 lines.
creator: fengguowudi
